SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. (no case file)
Dept. 514, Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Ken LaMance, Esq. for Plaintiff: Legalmatch.com.
Plaintiff's Witness Ken LaMance was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Steven L. Weiner

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Plaintiff's Exhibits A - Contract ------------------- ID/EVID
Exhibits B - Quickbook Report ----------- ID/EVID
Exhibits C - Log-In Service report------- ID/EVID

Damages - $10,000.00
Costs - per memo of costs.
Total - $10,000.00

Counsel to prepare a proposed Judgment for signature, also stipulated for the return of exhibits in open court.
